name: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)
author: OpenTikZ contributors
description: Block-level GAN overview: a low-dimensional latent bar feeds the generator G (expanding trapezoid) producing generated fake images, while a high-dimensional sample-space stack supplies real images; both feed the discriminator D (compressing trapezoid) that outputs a real/fake decision. Parametric sizes, colors, and labels.
